meta.title: Cadence Polypulse
meta.description: A polyrhythm trainer: up to three synchronized voices, a ring visualizer, a per-voice mixer, and a Coach mode with precision routines.

hero.tagline: Internalize polyrhythms, pulse by pulse, until they're yours.

description.title: Polyrhythms you can understand and feel
paragraphs: Cadence Polypulse is a trainer for internalizing polyrhythms: play up to three perfectly synced simultaneous rhythms (3:2, 4:3, 5:4, 7:4 and more) and hear how they lock together.
Visualize each voice as concentric rings that flash on their beat, adjust each rhythm's volume and pan in the mixer, and build your library with custom presets.
And when you want to take it further, open Coach mode: four interactive routines that measure your accuracy and track your progress. Powered by the same low-latency audio engine as Cadence Metronome.

voices.title: Up to 3 synced voices
voices.description: Simultaneous rhythms with sample-accurate timing (3:2, 4:3, 5:4, 7:4:3 and more).

presets.title: Presets & library
presets.description: Ready-to-use polyrhythms and custom presets saved between sessions.

visualizer.title: Ring visualizer
visualizer.description: Each voice is a concentric ring that lights up exactly on its beat.

mixer.title: Per-voice mixer
mixer.description: Independent volume, pan, mute and solo for each rhythm.

coach.title: Coach mode
coach.description: Four interactive routines that train and measure your rhythmic accuracy.

progress.title: Progress history
progress.description: A 7-day accuracy chart to follow how you're evolving.

hotUpdate.title: Seamless changes
hotUpdate.description: Adjust tempo, pulses or sound live, with no audio interruption.

privacy.title: Private & offline
privacy.description: Works without internet, in Spanish and English, and collects no data.

availability.title: Coming soon to the stores
availability.note: Cadence Polypulse is on its way to the App Store and Google Play. Check back soon to download it.

guides.title: Learn to read and feel polyrhythms
guides.description: Short guides: what a polyrhythm is, how to use training mode and the mixer.
